queryName: Default Security Groups With Unrestricted Traffic
expectedValue: Any 'AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup' with 'Properties.GroupName' set to 'default' should not have any traffic rules set.
actualValue: 'Resources.InstanceSecurityGroup_ingress' has 'Properties.GroupName' set to 'default' and traffic rules set in 'Properties'.

queryName: Default Security Groups With Unrestricted Traffic
expectedValue: Any 'AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup' with 'Properties.GroupName' set to 'default' should not have any traffic rules set.

queryName: Default Security Groups With Unrestricted Traffic
expectedValue: Any 'AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup' with 'Properties.GroupName' set to 'default' should not have any traffic rules set.
actualValue: 'Resources.InstanceSecurityGroup_default' has 'Properties.GroupName' set to 'default' and a standalone 'AWS::EC2::SecurityGroupIngress' rule set.
